Venue Info
Media Gallery
Dos Equis Pavilion
Dallas, TX
Previous Names:
Coca-Cola Starplex Amphitheatre (Changed after 1997)
Starplex Amphitheatre (Changed after 1999)
Smirnoff Music Centre (Changed after 2007)
Superpages.com Center (Changed after 2010)
Gexa Energy Pavilion (Changed after 2016)
Starplex Pavilion (Changed after 2017)
Seating Capacity: 20111
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 21
  DMB  (21)

Longest Performance:
09.16.00 - Two Step (26:14)

Song Liberations
  5.14.16 – Dive In (after 1702 days)
  5.19.18 – Steady As We Go (after 1357 days)
  6.1.24 – Black and Blue Bird (after 2170 days)
Venue Picture
Description
The Dos Equis Pavilion opened in the spring of 1988.

1818 1st Ave.
Dallas, TX 75210

Songs that made their debuts at this venue:
Spoon (full band) (8.13.98)
Everybody Wake Up (Our Finest Hour Arrives) (9.3.05)
